ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR ( AND (Price__c < 155, Tests_per_month__c < 100), AND (Price__c < 150, Tests_per_month__c < 250), AND (Price__c < 145, Tests_per_month__c < 400), AND (Price__c < 140, Tests_per_month__c < 600), AND (Price__c < 135, Tests_per_month__c < 800), AND (Price__c < 130, Tests_per_month__c < 5000) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: $155 (starting offer)​ $150​ if Tests per month = 100+ $145​ if Tests per month = 250+ $140​ if Tests per month = 400+ $135​ if Tests per month = 600+ $130​ if Tests per month = 800+
